settings.title: Five Years In, Cleaning for a Local Refuge
settings.excerpt: Our fifth birthday seemed like the moment to give a few of our hours each month to somewhere that needed them.
settings.body:
Sparkhaus is five years old this summer, grown from one person with a car boot of supplies to several teams across the area.

To mark it, we have committed to a regular free clean each month for a local women's refuge. They do extraordinary work on almost nothing, and a fresh, clean space matters more there than almost anywhere.

Our teams volunteered for the rota faster than we could write it, which told us everything about the people we work with.

To every client who has recommended us to a neighbour over these five years, thank you. That word of mouth is the only reason we grew.
